label: 831 to 834 Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 97–164, title I, § 122(a)96 Stat. 36Apr. 2, 1982
notes: Section 831, , , authorized Court of Customs and Patent Appeals to appoint a clerk, assistant clerks, stenographic law clerks, clerical assistants, and other necessary employees, and set out duties of clerk.act June 25, 1948, ch. 64662 Stat. 924

Section 832, acts , ; , , authorized Court of Customs and Patent Appeals to appoint a marshal and set out duties of that marshal.June 25, 1948, ch. 64662 Stat. 924May 24, 1949, ch. 139, § 7663 Stat. 101
Section 833, , , authorized Court of Customs and Patent Appeals to appoint a reporter and set out duties of that reporter.act June 25, 1948, ch. 64662 Stat. 925
Section 834, , , authorized Court of Customs and Patent Appeals to appoint necessary bailiffs and messengers and set out duties of those bailiffs and messengers.act June 25, 1948, ch. 64662 Stat. 925
